note: Curated MANUAL overlay of early/pre-release EN Pokémon sets. Unioned with auto-discovery (JP enEquivalent name x PriceCharting EN console) by scripts/build-pokemon-en-early.mjs -> data/pokemon-en-early.json. Use this for sets with no JP mapping, a name mismatch, or to pin a code/date. Manual entries win on name collision. A set is auto-dropped once pokemontcg.io lists it. pcSlug optional — the bake derives it from the name when omitted.
